project_description: Electronic contract management system for business customers. Contract generation from Word/PDF templates, electronic signature (qualified e-signature), contract repository with search, renewal reminder notifications, multi-level approval workflow, integration with CRM and ERP.
client_history: No history with electronic signature systems.
risk_patterns: Qualified e-signature — certification and legal testing always extend the project.
pm_comment: Electronic signature certification took 6 weeks instead of planned 2.
